dialogos.texto_en: Nino, Miku, sorry to keep you waiting.\nHere she is.
What's up? Is something wrong?\nDid Futaro-kun and the others go ahead without us?
There's something we want to confirm with you, Ichika.
Hm? With me?
You've been fidgety all day.\nWhat's on your mind?
Eh...
Fu-kun didn't seem to notice, but we did.
Ah...\nSo, everyone found out.\nI thought I was acting normal.
Well, you getting up early is not normal, Ichika.
Sorry,\nbut I was also really surprised when I heard that.
Ooohh...\nI guess my bad habits have caught up with me.
If there's something on your mind, please tell us.\nWe want everyone to be enjoying this trip together.
Miku...
(...She's right.\n Yes, I guess it's okay to tell everyone.)
Alright then.\nPlease listen.
What?
I'm thinking of going to Tokyo.
EHHHHHH?!
I-I haven't heard anything about this!!
Yes, because this is the first time I'm saying it.
Why?\nCould it be, to follow Futaro...?
No.\nIt's because I want to work harder as an actress.
No way... Not just Fu-kun,\nbut you'd also be going to Tokyo...
Ah, wait, wait, you're misunderstanding me!\nIt's not like I'm leaving right now!
Eh...
I mean, eventually.\nTo become a better actress,\nI think I need to work in Tokyo.
Oh...
That surprised me.
Y-you didn't explain yourself properly!\nDon't scare me like that!
Sorry, sorry.
So, are you serious about this?
Of course.\nI haven't talked to my agency yet,\nbut I definitely want to go someday.
...I understand.\nI guess you've decided that this is your path in life,\nso you can't do things halfway.
Yeah, that's right.
...Huh?
Um, Ichika?\nWhy did that conversation make you all fidgety today?
Ah... Well, that's because...
As I thought, is it because of Futaro?\nYou're gonna live together in Tokyo, or something?
Wouldn't it be nice if that happened?
Ahh!\nThat's why...!
So the reason you were grinning while looking \nat furniture with Fu-kun earlier, was because \nyou were imagining living together?!
That's not it... Well, that's not entirely true!
You admit it.
I'm really thinking of going to Tokyo\nto work hard as an actress!
That's not convincing at all!\nIsn't the main reason\nthat you want to live with Fu-kun?!
Now, now, calm down, Nino.\nIchika's feelings aren't wrong.
It's natural to want to live with someone you love.\nI think it's good that Ichika\nand Uesugi-san are together.
That's...
...I'm sorry.\nI got a little too emotional.
No, it's okay.\nI surprised you, didn't I.
You did.\nBut I know how serious you are\nabout your work as an actress, Ichika.
Thanks.
Have you told Uesugi-san about it yet?
Well, not yet.\nIt's hard to bring up.
Because it's related to Futaro-kun's future, right?
(...What should I do?\n With this flow... Should I mention that too...?)
(Okay! Just say everything you're thinking!)
So, um, I actually have a request for everyone.
A request? Like helping you tell Futaro?
No, it's not that.\nThat's something I should do myself.
Instead, this is something\nonly you all can help me with.
What is it?\nJust say it!
Well, I was thinking during this trip\nthat I'd like to simulate living together\nwith Futaro-kun...
Huh?
Wha! WHAT ARE YOU SAYING?!
N-no good?
Of course not!!
Umm, what do you mean by simulating living together?
Living together in one room%p-2;――\n%p;like staying in the same hotel room as Futaro,\nyou know?
Huh?!
I-i-i-is that, r-really, okay?\nIt seems like a bad idea?
It doesn't just SEEM like a bad idea, it IS bad!\nYou're getting a little too carried away!
No, I'm not getting carried away with this.\nI'm serious.
Living together isn't easy.\nEven we, as sisters, have had our share of difficulties.
Trying that with someone\nwho's a stranger to us like Futaro-kun\nwould be really hard.
A stranger, you say.
Even though we're dating, we're still strangers,\nright? So I want to practice a little.\nFor both me and Futaro-kun.
*sigh*\nGot it, I'll cooperate.
Thanks, Nino.
Me too!
I'll help too.\nIt's for Futaro's sake.
Thank you, both of you.
But, there's a condition.
Huh? What is it?
You have to stay in the same room\nas Fu-kun AND Raiha-chan, the three of you!\nThat way, nothing will go wrong.
Wh-wh-what do you mean, nothing will go wrong...?!
Naaah, I'm not planning anything weird.\nWe're just going to practice living together normally.
But, fine. That means Futaro-kun, Raiha-chan,\nand I will share the same room.
Awwww...\nEven though I'll be separated from Raiha-chan,\nit's for Ichika's sake, so okay!
Well then, let's hurry back and talk to Itsuki about it.\nWe'll also ask Raiha-chan... As for Fu-kun,\nit's fine to talk after we return to the hotel.
Yes.
